feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to connect sap btp with sap s/4 hana cloud private
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I have a newbie's doubt and I hope you can help me.
I have been developing ui5 applications in SAP BAS and in order to connect to an ERP ECC I was connecting through a destination from SAP BTP to Cloud Connector and then from Cloud Connector to an ERP ECC On premise.
My doubt is to understand how the connection works between SAP BAS or SAP BTP in reality, with SAP S/4 HANA CLOUD PRIVATE.

I hope you can help me to understand more about the architecture, thanks!

entry.title: Approve purchase order - SAP Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello experts, a pleasure to talk to you.
Today I have the following query:
I need to implement Fiori : Approve purchase order application (App ID: F0402A) on my SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Private system. (https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F0402A')/S32)
I've searched a lot but I'm just meager with the information I got, so I would like to know if someone could help me to find my way to implement this application.
My doubts are:
1) What is My inbox? and how does it relate to Approve purchase order.
2) Is there any demo video to see how the application works?
3) I only have to install the Front-End Components and the Back-end Components, and the application will start working?
4) Can I only implement the Approve purchase order application or should I implement some other application together with this one for its correct operation?

Of course I thank anyone who can help me, because it is a big problem I need to solve. Thank you very much in advance to everyone!

Regards, Max.

entry.title: What is the Difference between RISE with SAP and Grow with SAP Offering ?
entry.content:
Hello 

Can someone please explain fundamental difference between RISE with SAP and Grow with SAP offering from SAP ? I have read many blogs however all fail to explain the fundamental difference in terms of licensing, service delivery method, Solutions included and platform supported .

Appreciate explanation in this regard .

-Thanks 

Mamta Chauhan

entry.title: How to add Consolidation FS Item by Time Version to the Group Data Analysis app?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

This is my first time working with an FS Item configuration, so I might be missing some detail, however, I'll try to explain the issue as much as possible.

I have a requirement for extending the Group Data Analysis app (W0135) on a SAP S/4HANA 2022 on-premises system. The users need to be able to add some of the information available in the customising table "Consolidation FS Item by Time Version" (fincs_fsiassgmt).

So far, I have gone with the ABAP Extensibility route and added a custom CDS extension to the GDA query (C_CnsldtnRpt30Q) and the underlying Matrix Consolidation views (I_MatrixCnsldtnFndnCube and I_MatrixCnsldtnFndnPeriodic). With this, the fields become available in the Query. However, there's an unexpected result when running the query.

The FS Item has two validity periods in the customising table (using CDS view I_CnsldtnFSItemByTimeVersion), one on FYP range 0000.000 to 2023.004 and the other on FYP 2023.005 to 9999.999

 

But the resulting query run with YTD Period Mode shows the Elimination Selection field as unchanged only until FYP > 2024.000. 

The users are expecting to see the YTD mode to reflect the configuration on the FS Item Attribute, even if there is no data in ACDOCU until FYP 2024.000.

Here's an extract of my implementation of the link between the CDS views:

extend view C_CnsldtnRpt30Q with YGL_COBL_E_GRPDTAPPEXT
{
// ...
  @AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #FREE
  @AnalyticsDetails.query.display: #KEY_TEXT
  MatrixCnsldtnFndnCube.CnsldtnFSItemElimination,

  @AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #FREE
  @AnalyticsDetails.query.display: #KEY_TEXT
  MatrixCnsldtnFndnCube.CnsldtnFSItemCustomerSpecific
}

 

extend view I_MatrixCnsldtnFndnCube with YGL_COBL_E_MTRXCNSLDFNCEXT
{
// ...
  association [0..1] to I_CnsldtnFSItemByTimeVersion as _CsFSItemAttribute on  $projection.consolidationchartofaccounts =  _CsFSItemAttribute.ConsolidationChartOfAccounts
                                                                           and $projection.financialstatementitem       =  _CsFSItemAttribute.CnsldtnFinancialStatementItem
                                                                           and $projection.consolidationversion         =  _CsFSItemAttribute.ConsolidationVersion
                                                                           and $projection.fiscalyearperiod             >= _CsFSItemAttribute.FromFiscalYearPeriod
                                                                           and $projection.fiscalyearperiod             <= _CsFSItemAttribute.ToFiscalYearPeriod

// ...
  @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_CnsldtnFSItemElimination'
  _CsFSItemAttribute.CnsldtnFSItemElimination,

  @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_CnsldtnFSItemCustSpcfc'
  _CsFSItemAttribute.CnsldtnFSItemCustomerSpecific,

  _CsFSItemAttribute,
  _CsFSItemAttribute._CnsldtnFSItemElimination,
  _CsFSItemAttribute._CnsldtnFSItemCustSpcfc,

}
extend view I_MatrixCnsldtnFndnPeriodic with YGL_COBL_E_IMCFNDNPEXT
{
//...
  association [0..1] to I_CnsldtnFSItemByTimeVersion as _CsFSItemAttribute on  $projection.consolidationchartofaccounts =  _CsFSItemAttribute.ConsolidationChartOfAccounts
                                                                           and $projection.financialstatementitem       =  _CsFSItemAttribute.CnsldtnFinancialStatementItem
                                                                           and $projection.consolidationversion         =  _CsFSItemAttribute.ConsolidationVersion
                                                                           and $projection.fiscalyearperiod             >= _CsFSItemAttribute.FromFiscalYearPeriod
                                                                           and $projection.fiscalyearperiod             <= _CsFSItemAttribute.ToFiscalYearPeriod

// ...

  @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_CnsldtnFSItemElimination'
  _CsFSItemAttribute.CnsldtnFSItemElimination,

  @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_CnsldtnFSItemCustSpcfc'
  _CsFSItemAttribute.CnsldtnFSItemCustomerSpecific,
  _CsFSItemAttribute,
  _CsFSItemAttribute._CnsldtnFSItemElimination,
  _CsFSItemAttribute._CnsldtnFSItemCustSpcfc,

//...
}

 

  1. Am I missing some functionality of the FS Item configuration? Or is it an error in the logic of the CDS views that retrieve the data from the Consolidation tables?
  2. Are CDS views too complicated for this task? Is there any other way to implement this? Maybe using the Custom Fields and Logic app?

In any case, many thanks in advance for any help or guidance that you can provide.

entry.title: Missing packages for S/4 Migration in Maintenance Planner
entry.content:
Hello friends.

When I upload my XML in the Maintenance Planner and plan an S4 migration, I get the message that packages are missing. How do I proceed now? Do I have to wait until the next release?

Missing packages:

SAPK-10802INS4CEXT
SAPK-10802INS4CORE
SAPK-10802INS4COREOP
SAPK-10802INS4DEPREC
SAPK-10802INS4FND

entry.title: What is the Better way for developing Reports in SAP S/4 Hana private Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

We are working on SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition implementation, it would be grateful  if you could suggest what is the better way for developing Reports in Private Edition?

Whether we need to develop in ALV Reports in SE38 or any other feasible way for developing in Private edition?

Thanks in Advance,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to Develop Adobe Forms in SAP S/4 Private Edition like Public Edition through Binding Fields?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

Is it feasible to develop Adobe forms in SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition through Binding Fields(XML) similar to how we do in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition?

It would be grateful if you could help me with steps needs to be followed for development of Adobe Forms in Private Edition.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to extend DRF SOAP Outbound Service with Custom Fields?
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently configuring the Data Replication Framework in an S/4HANA on-premise system - for the replication of data to SAP Cloud for Customer. Our requirement is to extend the Business Objects (e.g. 986 BP or 194 Material) or the Outbound SOAP Messages with custom fields. Unfortunately, I cannot find any documentation or community contributions that describe the procedure

Can anyone help?

Thanks in advance and best regards

entry.title: Dynamic parallel processing in SAP S/4HANA flexible workflow
entry.content:
In classical workflow we had option to create parallel approval workitems based on a multiline element using something like &et_item[&_WF_PARFOREACH_INDEX&]& in binding of the activity whereas the et_item is a multiline elemet in 'Miscellaneous' tab of the activity. 

But flexible workflow is based on a workflow scenario. Is any similar feature available in flexible workflow? 

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: CDS View for the WorkPackages Tables in the Plan Customer Projects App
entry.content:
Hello everyone. 

I' am searching a View that shows me the same information that are visible in the table from the Work Packages in the App "Plan Customer Projects".

I have searched for many views but I haven't found nothing that shows me the Planned Revenue on the Basis of the Work Packages in an Customer Project. 

Does anyone know what is the name of the CDS-View that has this information or does anyone know how i can get this informations?.

Thank you very much for your help.

Best regards,
Simone

entry.title: Dynamic parallel processing in SAP S/4HANA flexible workflow
entry.content:
Hi,

We have an existing custom classic workflow for purchase order where the approval is based on multiple cost centers of line items. It uses dynamic parallel processing (par-for-each) using multiline element and a sub workflow 

In SAP S/4HANA in-premise flexible workflow, is it possible to achieve dynamic parallel processing if we create a custom workflow scenario? Would appreciate if any content or blog post is available. 

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Create GS1 barcode in Adobe Form(Adobe lifecycle designer)
entry.content:
We have a requirement to add GS1 standards barcode in adobe form and access it through S/4 cloud 2402.

While adding the GS1 barcodes available in adobe lifecycle designer(version 11.0) seems like only data matrix works.(not needed for project requirement)

We want to have GS1 barcode like (01)00004(10)12345(17)789937882.

I tried adding Code-128 and concatenating fields with AI (01),(10) etc at calculate event for Barcode.But not sure if that might be right way or is there anything more to be added.

Please help.

entry.title: Custom document type not available in filter in app, Manage Purchase Order.
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have created document types for PO in Sap Gui but I am not able to display them in the fiori app. I created document types with specific screen layout. But only document types with certain screen layout like NBB are available in the Manage Purchase Order app.

Is it possible to set it up?

entry.title: Activation errors while extending Material number length in BW
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Our client is upgrading their ECC to S/4HANA and in the process enabled the extended material number functionality in S/4HANA. The material number length is now extended to CHAR 40.

As a result, the material length need to be extended to CHAR 40 in SAP BW system to match with S/4HANA material length. We are doing a PoC in BW sandbox and followed the process mentioned in SAP Note 2422224, Scenario 2 (<= 40 CHAR) to extend  0MATERIAL length in BW environment. Our BW is on version 750, SP 25.  As per the note, the prior step is completed of maintaining table RSTMCNV in BW with same entry as table TMCNV in S/4HANA. 

Next step we try to change the 0MATERIAL length from 18 to 40 and conversion exit from MATN1 to MATNB. While trying to activate the infoobject we are encountering lots of errors with structural change at field level for dependent tables as below. It shows around 197 tables have structural impact at field and need conversion, moreover 0MATERIAL is not getting activated. If we adjust the table structure via SE14 the material field is going back to CHAR 18.

 

Structure change at field level (convert table xxxxxxxx)

Can you please advise if anyone has successfully able to achieve the 0MATERIAL length changed to 40 with data available in the BW system. Please suggest any best approach to follow to convert material length in BW for this scenario.

Thanks

entry.title: How to hide Custom field in Billing Document item based on condition in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

How to hide custom fields in Billing Document Item based on Condition? Same requirement i had in Sale order screen and achieved it through BADI. But i don't see similar BADI released for billing document to set properties of custom fields to Invisible / mandatory / read-only?

It would be grateful if you could help me in hiding custom fields in billing document item level.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Custom fields flow from Sale order to Purchase Requisition and Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

I have created few custom fields in Sale order item level, and i wanted those to flow to Purchase requisition and Purchase order in SAP S4HANA Public Edition.

I checked in Business Scenarios Tab while creating custom fields but unable to find PR and PO to enable.

It would be grateful if you could help me.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Search SAP tables via ODBC connection with power BI
entry.content:
Good morning,
Using the coordinates of the user CUST_USER_ROLE_ADMIN, it is not possible for me to target the location of the SAP tables when connecting to Power BI via ODBC.

I would appreciate it if you could provide me with support or a document to use to properly comprehend and establish a reading of SAP data via Power BI using an ODBC connection or the SAP hana connector of power BI desktop?
Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP MDG: Full Forms of column names in Mapping Sheet
entry.content:
Hi SCN People, 

Hope you guys are doing well 🙂

I recently downloaded the Sheet form S Note, I checked in Legend sheet but not found, some of the column names not able to guess in below screenshot (CMP, GOV & MOP).


Thanks, 

Suggu Sandeep.

SAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: Sales Intercompany with WBS Element - VF156 error
entry.content:
Greetings,

I have an intercompany service sales scenario, that is, a plant in the group sells a service to the customer, but it will be another plant in the group that will provide the service.

I believe that the problem is in the accounting of the WBS element that is assigned to the plant. As the sales order VA01 is assigned to a sales organization/company, but the item was assigned to the plant that will provide the service, when trying to invoice the sales order I get the error:

Spoiler
VF156 No WBS billing element found while substituting WBS element 00000200.

The SAP Note 672929 already described in other topics left me with more questions than answers. What should be done?
Should the SAP PS consultant configure it so that when it is an Intercompany process, the cost accounting does not happen in the WBS element, but in a higher structure?

Thanks in advance 🙂

entry.title: test
entry.content: test
